GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,1/2,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4  GM6  GM3  GM5  (R)E1+E2-  (R)E1-E2+  (R)E4E5  (R)E3E6  (S)C1+C2-  (S)C1-C2+  (S)C4C5  (S)C3C6  (T)D1+  (T)D1-  (T)D2+  (T)D2-  (T)D4  (T)D6  (T)D3  (T)D5  (U)A1+A2-  (U)A1-A2+  (U)A4A5  (U)A3A6  (X)Y1+Y2-  (X)Y1-Y2+  (X)Y4Y5  (X)Y3Y6  (Y)Z1+  (Y)Z1-  (Y)Z2+  (Y)Z2-  (Y)Z4  (Y)Z6  (Y)Z3  (Y)Z5  (Z)B1+  (Z)B1-  (Z)B2+  (Z)B2-  (Z)B4  (Z)B6  (Z)B3  (Z)B5
